general.title: General Settings
general.description: Manage your organization name and default client. The default client is used for configuration purposes and represents your MSP.

defaultTimezone.help: Used for emails and notifications when a user has not set their own timezone.

numbering.title: Number Format
numbering.description: Define the prefix, digit padding, and current sequence

prefix.label: Ticket Number Prefix
prefix.help: Optional prefix for ticket numbers. Leave empty for no prefix or enter a custom prefix (e.g., 'TK-')

minimumDigits.label: Minimum Digits
minimumDigits.help: Minimum number of digits for the sequential number. For example, 6 makes '1' become '000001'

initialValue.label: Initial Value
initialValue.help: Set the starting number for the sequence. This can only be set once.

lastUsedNumber.label: Last Used Number
lastUsedNumber.help: The last number that was assigned. The next number will be one higher than this value.

nextPreview.label: Next Ticket Number Preview
nextPreview.help: This is the number that will be assigned to the next ticket

dialog.title: Update Ticket Number Settings
dialog.message: Changing these settings will affect how new ticket numbers are generated. This change will not affect existing tickets. Are you sure you want to proceed?

statuses.title: Ticket Statuses
statuses.alert: Default Status: When clients create tickets through the client portal, they will automatically be assigned the status marked as default. Only one status can be set as default at a time.

statusLabels.closedHelp: Tickets with this status will be marked as closed
statusLabels.openHelp: Tickets with this status will remain open
statusLabels.defaultHelp: Default status for new tickets from client portal

statuses.retiredAlert: Os estados dos tickets agora são geridos dentro de cada quadro. Use a aba Quadros para editar os ciclos de vida dos tickets de um quadro específico.

error.lastClosed: At least one status must remain marked as closed
error.deleteLastClosed: Cannot delete the last closed status for this type.
error.removeDefault: Cannot remove default status from the last default status

boards.title: Boards
boards.alert: Boards organize tickets into logical groups. Each board can have its own default agent, priority, and SLA policy.

displayOrder.label: Display Order
displayOrder.help: Controls the order boards appear in the list

boardManager.label: Board Manager
boardManager.help: The user responsible for managing this board

defaultAssignedAgent.label: Default Assigned Agent
defaultAssignedAgent.help: New tickets on this board will be assigned to this agent by default

defaultPriority.label: Default Priority
defaultPriority.help: New tickets on this board will use this priority by default

slaPolicy.label: SLA Policy
slaPolicy.help: The SLA policy to apply to tickets on this board

ticketStatusSetup.label: Configuração de estados de tickets
ticketStatusSetup.help: Escolha se este quadro começa a partir de um ciclo de vida existente ou de uma nova lista de estados em linha.

copyTicketStatuses.label: Copiar estados de tickets de
copyTicketStatuses.help: Novos quadros clonam o seu ciclo de vida de tickets de um quadro existente.

ticketStatuses.helpEditing: Edite o ciclo de vida de tickets apenas para este quadro.
ticketStatuses.helpCopied: Reveja e ajuste o ciclo de vida copiado antes de guardar o novo quadro.
ticketStatuses.helpInline: Crie o ciclo de vida inicial de tickets do quadro antes de guardar.
ticketStatuses.loading: A carregar estados de tickets do quadro…

inboundReplyReopen.enabledLabel: Reabrir tickets fechados em respostas recebidas
inboundReplyReopen.enabledHelp: Aplica-se a respostas encadeadas correspondentes a tickets já fechados neste quadro.
inboundReplyReopen.cutoffHoursHelp: Respostas recebidas após este período criam novos tickets em vez de reabrir os antigos.
inboundReplyReopen.statusUseDefault: Usar o estado aberto padrão do quadro
inboundReplyReopen.suppressAiLabel: Suprimir reabertura para respostas curtas de confirmação (IA)
inboundReplyReopen.suppressAiHelp: Apenas complemento Enterprise AI Assistant. Se indisponível, as respostas reabrem normalmente.

liveTimer.label: Ativar cronómetro de ticket em tempo real
liveTimer.help: Mostra o cronómetro em tempo real e os intervalos registados nos tickets deste quadro. A introdução manual de tempo permanece disponível.

dialog.deleteBoardMessage: This will permanently delete the board.
dialog.cleanupItilMessage: This will remove the ITIL categories and priority matrix associated with this board.

itilInfo.impactDescription: Impact levels define the scope of the issue
itilInfo.urgencyDescription: Urgency levels define how quickly the issue needs resolution
itilInfo.priorityDescription: Priority is calculated from impact and urgency
